TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-moving_Kainu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kalanaymu ku sami ka matu'uwal de nake a kinqiyanux.
S.PHON: kalanajmu ku s~ɕami ka matuʔuwal *e nake a kinqijanux.
S.FORM: kalanaymu ku sami ka matu'uwal de nake a kinqiyanux.
S.PHON: kalanajmu ku s~ɕami ka matuʔuwal *e nake a kinqijanux.
S.TRANSL: 我來敘說我們Matu'uwal 的生活.
I will tell you our life of Matu'uwal.

S.FORM: aring su nabakis sunga' ga ini'mu baqi ku kinqiyanux nku nabakis gi ti'i kuwing hani ga a kinabahan kuwing sawni' la.
S.PHON: ariŋ s~ɕu naβakis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa iniʔmu βaqi ku kinqijanux nku naβakis~ɕ ɣi tiʔi kuwiŋ ħani ɣa a kinaβaħan kuwiŋ s~ɕawniʔ la.
S.FORM: aring su nabakis sunga' ga ini'mu baqi ku kinqiyanux nku nabakis gi ti'i kuwing hani ga a kinabahan kuwing sawni' la.
S.PHON: ariŋ s~ɕu naβakis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa iniʔmu βaqi ku kinqijanux nku naβakis~ɕ ɣi tiʔi kuwiŋ ħani ɣa a kinaβaħan kuwiŋ s~ɕawniʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 從老人家以前,我不知道老人家的生活,因為我已經是現代人.
Since the forefathers, I don't know their lives because I live in modern days.

S.FORM: ru tiku inkahulan ga ini' baqi asikina ga pinugan sku kai' nku nakautasmiyan ka aruwa masisuru i aruwa i babaw na kaal la.
S.PHON: ru tiku inkaħulan ɣa iniʔ βaqi as~ɕikina ɣa pinuɣan s~ɕku kaiʔ nku nakautas~ɕmijan ka aruwa mas~ɕis~ɕuru i aruwa i βaβaw na kaal la.
S.FORM: ru tiku inkahulan ga ini' baqi asikina ga pinugan sku kai' nku nakautasmiyan ka aruwa masisuru i aruwa i babaw na kaal la.
S.PHON: ru tiku inkaħulan ɣa iniʔ βaqi as~ɕikina ɣa pinuɣan s~ɕku kaiʔ nku nakautas~ɕmijan ka aruwa mas~ɕis~ɕuru i aruwa i βaβaw na kaal la.
S.TRANSL: 我不知道我們的發源地,但我聽已經去世的長輩們說過.
I don't know our origin, but I've heard about it from our ancestors.

S.FORM: tiku inuwahanmiyan ga minakisami i papak hasa.
S.PHON: tiku inuwaħanmijan ɣa minakis~ɕami i papak ħas~ɕa.
S.FORM: tiku inuwahanmiyan ga minakisami i papak hasa.
S.PHON: tiku inuwaħanmijan ɣa minakis~ɕami i papak ħas~ɕa.
S.TRANSL: 我們的發源地和住過的地方是Papak.
The place we came from and the place we used to live in is Papak.

S.FORM: makisami papak sunga' ga ini'sami kahabag gi nanu' gi itaalsami ga kisami minukahul inu' ga ini' baqi.
S.PHON: makis~ɕami papak s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa iniʔs~ɕami kaħaβaɣ ɣi nanuʔ ɣi itaals~ɕami ɣa kis~ɕami minukaħul inuʔ ɣa iniʔ βaqi.
S.FORM: makisami papak sunga' ga ini'sami kahabag gi nanu' gi itaalsami ga kisami minukahul inu' ga ini' baqi.
S.PHON: makis~ɕami papak s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa iniʔs~ɕami kaħaβaɣ ɣi nanuʔ ɣi itaals~ɕami ɣa kis~ɕami minukaħul inuʔ ɣa iniʔ βaqi.
S.TRANSL: 我們以前住在Papak的時候,人不多,因為我們泰雅人連從哪裡來都不知道.
When we lived in Papak, there were not manu people because we even don't know where we came from.

S.FORM: ru nanu' u yani ku a niyanmu i sikaal.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ u jani ku a nijanmu i s~ɕikaal.
S.FORM: ru nanu' u yani ku a niyanmu i sikaal.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ u jani ku a nijanmu i s~ɕikaal.
S.TRANSL: 這就是我正在敘述的事情.
This is what I am saying.

S.FORM: nukahan sami papak makisami papak sunga' ga uniyal ku sunga' ga uniyal ku baru' asi nku ag.
S.PHON: nukaħan s~ɕami papak makis~ɕami papak s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa unijal ku s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa unijal ku βaruʔ as~ɕi nku aɣ.
S.FORM: nukahan sami papak makisami papak sunga' ga uniyal ku sunga' ga uniyal ku baru' asi nku ag.
S.PHON: nukaħan s~ɕami papak makis~ɕami papak s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa unijal ku s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa unijal ku βaruʔ as~ɕi nku aɣ.
S.TRANSL: 我們從papak來,而且我們以前在papak的時候,來了洪水.
We came from Papak, and when we lived in Papak before, there came the flood.

S.FORM: kinqiyanux nku gipun ka niyal i a mararaya sku rauq ku wasilung ga.
S.PHON: kinqijanux nku ɣipun ka nijal i a mararaja s~ɕku rauq ku was~ɕiluŋ ɣa.
S.FORM: kinqiyanux nku gipun ka niyal i a mararaya sku rauq ku wasilung ga.
S.PHON: kinqijanux nku ɣipun ka nijal i a mararaja s~ɕku rauq ku was~ɕiluŋ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 日本時代的生活,河水上升淹沒了土地.
During the life under Japanese occupation, the water increased and the flood engulfed the land.

S.FORM: mkgi ru mgiyaysami ki papak mgiyaysami kiya la ga kiya ruma' la ga aruwa i qaluysun na wasilung la ru ini' kahabag la ku maki kiya.
S.PHON: mkɣi ru mɣijajs~ɕami ki papak mɣijajs~ɕami kija la ɣa kija rumaʔ la ɣa aruwa i qalujs~ɕun na was~ɕiluŋ la ru iniʔ kaħaβaɣ la ku maki kija.
S.FORM: mkgi ru mgiyaysami ki papak mgiyaysami kiya la ga kiya ruma' la ga aruwa i qaluysun na wasilung la ru ini' kahabag la ku maki kiya.
S.PHON: mkɣi ru mɣijajs~ɕami ki papak mɣijajs~ɕami kija la ɣa kija rumaʔ la ɣa aruwa i qalujs~ɕun na was~ɕiluŋ la ru iniʔ kaħaβaɣ la ku maki kija.
S.TRANSL: 我們離開Papak之後,經洪水沖刷,現在沒有很多人住那邊了.
After we left Papak, there were not many people living there after being washed away by the flood.

S.FORM: ru nanu' a maqiyanuxsami kiya ru.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ a maqijanuxs~ɕami kija ru.
S.FORM: ru nanu' a maqiyanuxsami kiya ru.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ a maqijanuxs~ɕami kija ru.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們一直在那邊生活.
And then we live our lives there.

S.FORM: ki'i mahananu ku kinqiyanuxmiyan ka niyasami lahuwun na kamisama' ruwa.
S.PHON: kiʔi maħananu ku kinqijanuxmijan ka nijas~ɕami laħuwun na kamis~ɕamaʔ ruwa.
S.FORM: ki'i mahananu ku kinqiyanuxmiyan ka niyasami lahuwun na kamisama' ruwa.
S.PHON: kiʔi maħananu ku kinqijanuxmijan ka nijas~ɕami laħuwun na kamis~ɕamaʔ ruwa.
S.TRANSL: 不知道怎麼回事,老天仍留他們繼續在那邊生活.
Not knowing how, the gods keep them living there.

S.FORM: ru makisami kiya ru muwahsami la.
S.PHON: ru makis~ɕami kija ru muwaħs~ɕami la.
S.FORM: ru makisami kiya ru muwahsami la.
S.PHON: ru makis~ɕami kija ru muwaħs~ɕami la.

TRANSL.notes: 我們在(papak)那邊生活,然後就來了.

S.TRANSL: 我們在 那邊生活,然後就來了.

TRANSL.notes: We live there (in Papak) and then come over here.

S.TRANSL: We live there and then come over here.

S.FORM: aruwa la ku wasilung la gi aruwa mayayahu la ku wasilung la gi e ki'i yani ku ska'nia la ru aruwa i mana'aping la ku wasilung la ru muwahsami la i mabatuan hani la.
S.PHON: aruwa la ku was~ɕiluŋ la ɣi aruwa majajaħu la ku was~ɕiluŋ la ɣi e kiʔi jani ku s~ɕkaʔnia la ru aruwa i manaʔapiŋ la ku was~ɕiluŋ la ru muwaħs~ɕami la i maβatuan ħani la.
S.FORM: aruwa la ku wasilung la gi aruwa mayayahu la ku wasilung la gi e ki'i yani ku ska'nia la ru aruwa i mana'aping la ku wasilung la ru muwahsami la i mabatuan hani la.
S.PHON: aruwa la ku was~ɕiluŋ la ɣi aruwa majajaħu la ku was~ɕiluŋ la ɣi e kiʔi jani ku s~ɕkaʔnia la ru aruwa i manaʔapiŋ la ku was~ɕiluŋ la ru muwaħs~ɕami la i maβatuan ħani la.
S.TRANSL: 或許已經夠了,洪水就退了,水乾了之後我們就來到Mabatuan.

TRANSL.notes: When the flood went away, perhaps because (the gods think) it is enough, the water dried and we came to Mabatuan.

S.TRANSL: When the flood went away, perhaps because it is enough, the water dried and we came to Mabatuan.

S.FORM: muwahsami mabatuan ru ukas ku niqunniyam la ga.
S.PHON: muwaħs~ɕami maβatuan ru ukas~ɕ ku niqunnijam la ɣa.
S.FORM: muwahsami mabatuan ru ukas ku niqunniyam la ga.
S.PHON: muwaħs~ɕami maβatuan ru ukas~ɕ ku niqunnijam la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 我們來到Mabatuan之後沒有糧食.
When we came to Mabatuan, there was no food.

S.FORM: naniqunniyam la ga niyan lumanglung ku na sami ka nabakis maha u kiyata' tmubuh tikay su naniqun.
S.PHON: naniqunnijam la ɣa nijan lumaŋluŋ ku na s~ɕami ka naβakis~ɕ maħa u kijataʔ tmuβuħ tikaj s~ɕu naniqun.
S.FORM: naniqunniyam la ga niyan lumanglung ku na sami ka nabakis maha u kiyata' tmubuh tikay su naniqun.
S.PHON: naniqunnijam la ɣa nijan lumaŋluŋ ku na s~ɕami ka naβakis~ɕ maħa u kijataʔ tmuβuħ tikaj s~ɕu naniqun.
S.TRANSL: 沒有糧食,我們的老人家就想說,我們來播種一些糧食作物.
There is no food, so our forefathers thought that we can sow and grow some food.

S.FORM: nanu' u musa'sami i kumiyum sku gaghap ru lumuwagsami sku gaghap gaghap na pati' aping.
S.PHON: nanuʔ u mus~ɕaʔs~ɕami i kumijum s~ɕku ɣaɣħap ru lumuwaɣs~ɕami s~ɕku ɣaɣħap ɣaɣħap na patiʔ apiŋ.
S.FORM: nanu' u musa'sami i kumiyum sku gaghap ru lumuwagsami sku gaghap gaghap na pati' aping.
S.PHON: nanuʔ u mus~ɕaʔs~ɕami i kumijum s~ɕku ɣaɣħap ru lumuwaɣs~ɕami s~ɕku ɣaɣħap ɣaɣħap na patiʔ apiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們去尋找而且找到了種子,如旱稻的種子.
We go to look for seeds and find seeds like seeds of dry rice.

S.FORM: ru i makabuway la ga yani ku a kalhunmiyan suxu'unmiyan na luhiyung.
S.PHON: ru i makaβuwaj la ɣa jani ku a kalħunmijan s~ɕuxuʔunmijan na luħijuŋ.
S.FORM: ru i makabuway la ga yani ku a kalhunmiyan suxu'unmiyan na luhiyung.
S.PHON: ru i makaβuwaj la ɣa jani ku a kalħunmijan s~ɕuxuʔunmijan na luħijuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 稻子結穗之後,我們收割並且用杵臼搗米.
After the rice bear seeds, we harvest and pound the rice with mortars.

S.FORM: gi kiya ku luhiyung sunga' ka kinbalaymiyan nanak la ru.
S.PHON: ɣi kija ku luħijuŋ s~ɕuŋaʔ ka kinβalajmijan nanak la ru.
S.FORM: gi kiya ku luhiyung sunga' ka kinbalaymiyan nanak la ru.
S.PHON: ɣi kija ku luħijuŋ s~ɕuŋaʔ ka kinβalajmijan nanak la ru.

TRANSL.notes: 因為以前(只)有臼,我們都得自己做.

S.TRANSL: 因為以前 有臼,我們都得自己做.
Because there was mortar before, we have to make it by ourselves.

S.FORM: suxu'unmiyan kiya gi bali kiya a tingki bali kiya a a nanu' nanak bay ku qahba' bay ku asi langlung gi ini' i qabaq su inlalungan ku nabakis.
S.PHON: s~ɕuxuʔunmijan kija ɣi βali kija a tiŋki βali kija a a nanuʔ nanak βaj ku qaħβaʔ βaj ku as~ɕi laŋluŋ ɣi iniʔ i qaβaq s~ɕu inlaluŋan ku naβakis~ɕ.
S.FORM: suxu'unmiyan kiya gi bali kiya a tingki bali kiya a a nanu' nanak bay ku qahba' bay ku asi langlung gi ini' i qabaq su inlalungan ku nabakis.
S.PHON: s~ɕuxuʔunmijan kija ɣi βali kija a tiŋki βali kija a a nanuʔ nanak βaj ku qaħβaʔ βaj ku as~ɕi laŋluŋ ɣi iniʔ i qaβaq s~ɕu inlaluŋan ku naβakis~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 沒有電,而且老人家想不到別的方法,只能用手搗米.
There was no electricity, and the forefathers could not think of other ways but using hands to pound the rice.

S.FORM: ru suxu'unmiyan sa luhiyung ru matababuwax la ku pati' ku buwah la ga.
S.PHON: ru s~ɕuxuʔunmijan s~ɕa luħijuŋ ru mataβaβuwax la ku patiʔ ku βuwaħ la ɣa.
S.FORM: ru suxu'unmiyan sa luhiyung ru matababuwax la ku pati' ku buwah la ga.
S.PHON: ru s~ɕuxuʔunmijan s~ɕa luħijuŋ ru mataβaβuwax la ku patiʔ ku βuwaħ la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 我們用臼將稻穀脫殼搗成白米.
We pound the rice and turn unhusked rice into uncooked rice with the mortar.

S.FORM: nanu' u pahapuyunmiyan pahapuyunmiyan la ru yani ku sikaqiyanuxmiyan.
S.PHON: nanuʔ u paħapujunmijan paħapujunmijan la ru jani ku s~ɕikaqijanuxmijan.
S.FORM: nanu' u pahapuyunmiyan pahapuyunmiyan la ru yani ku sikaqiyanuxmiyan.
S.PHON: nanuʔ u paħapujunmijan paħapujunmijan la ru jani ku s~ɕikaqijanuxmijan.
S.TRANSL: 我們煮飯,這就是我們生活的方式.
And we cooked, and that is how we live our lives.

S.FORM: ru tiku hani la ga niyansami i makisami mabatuan sunga' ga.
S.PHON: ru tiku ħani la ɣa nijans~ɕami i makis~ɕami maβatuan s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: ru tiku hani la ga niyansami i makisami mabatuan sunga' ga.
S.PHON: ru tiku ħani la ɣa nijans~ɕami i makis~ɕami maβatuan s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 之後我們就住在Mabatuan.
Afterwards, we live in Mabatuan.

S.FORM: kumaal ku gipun sunga' maha u gi tiku gipun sunga' ga minlahang tikay ku taiwan ru tiku gipun ga kumaal maha uwah bay hugal la ru psibaqaysimu su paptauwaw la maha.
S.PHON: kumaal ku ɣipun s~ɕuŋaʔ maħa u ɣi tiku ɣipun s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa minlaħaŋ tikaj ku taiwan ru tiku ɣipun ɣa kumaal maħa uwaħ βaj ħuɣal la ru ps~ɕiβaqajs~ɕimu s~ɕu paptauwaw la maħa.
S.FORM: kumaal ku gipun sunga' maha u gi tiku gipun sunga' ga minlahang tikay ku taiwan ru tiku gipun ga kumaal maha uwah bay hugal la ru psibaqaysimu su paptauwaw la maha.
S.PHON: kumaal ku ɣipun s~ɕuŋaʔ maħa u ɣi tiku ɣipun s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa minlaħaŋ tikaj ku taiwan ru tiku ɣipun ɣa kumaal maħa uwaħ βaj ħuɣal la ru ps~ɕiβaqajs~ɕimu s~ɕu paptauwaw la maħa.
S.TRANSL: 日本人治理台灣時,他們說如果我們搬下來,他們會教我們耕種.
When the Japanese ruled Taiwan, they said that if we move downward, they would teach us how to farm.

S.FORM: nanu' muwahsami subalay tagiruni la gi tiku kakianmiyan hani ga sabawqil salun.
S.PHON: nanuʔ muwaħs~ɕami s~ɕuβalaj taɣiruni la ɣi tiku kakianmijan ħani ɣa s~ɕaβawqil s~ɕalun.
S.FORM: nanu' muwahsami subalay tagiruni la gi tiku kakianmiyan hani ga sabawqil salun.
S.PHON: nanuʔ muwaħs~ɕami s~ɕuβalaj taɣiruni la ɣi tiku kakianmijan ħani ɣa s~ɕaβawqil s~ɕalun.
S.TRANSL: 我們真的搬下來到這,我們現在住的地方叫做 Sabawqil.
We did move downward here, and the place we're staying now is called Sabawqil.

S.FORM: ru mabatuan san gi suwa' salun mabatuan ga inkahulanmiyan sku inkahulanmiyan sku inkahulanmiyan i mabatuan mabatuan salun ku rauq ka yani.
S.PHON: ru maβatuan s~ɕan ɣi s~ɕuwaʔ s~ɕalun maβatuan ɣa inkaħulanmijan s~ɕku inkaħulanmijan s~ɕku inkaħulanmijan i maβatuan maβatuan s~ɕalun ku rauq ka jani.
S.FORM: ru mabatuan san gi suwa' salun mabatuan ga inkahulanmiyan sku inkahulanmiyan sku inkahulanmiyan i mabatuan mabatuan salun ku rauq ka yani.
S.PHON: ru maβatuan s~ɕan ɣi s~ɕuwaʔ s~ɕalun maβatuan ɣa inkaħulanmijan s~ɕku inkaħulanmijan s~ɕku inkaħulanmijan i maβatuan maβatuan s~ɕalun ku rauq ka jani.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼叫Mabatuan是因為我們的祖居地,我們發源的那塊土地就叫Mabatuan.
As for why it is called Mabatuan, it's because the place we came from, our origin, was the land called Mabatuan.

S.FORM: ru muwahsami runi i i tapin hani.
S.PHON: ru muwaħs~ɕami runi i i tapin ħani.
S.FORM: ru muwahsami runi i i tapin hani.
S.PHON: ru muwaħs~ɕami runi i i tapin ħani.
S.TRANSL: 接著我們來到大坪這邊.
Then we come to Tapin.

S.FORM: sss sasan tapin ru tapin san la ga kai' na a tu'iya' la.
S.PHON: s~ɕs~ɕs~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕan tapin ru tapin s~ɕan la ɣa kaiʔ na a tuʔijaʔ la.
S.FORM: sss sasan tapin ru tapin san la ga kai' na a tu'iya' la.
S.PHON: s~ɕs~ɕs~ɕ s~ɕas~ɕan tapin ru tapin s~ɕan la ɣa kaiʔ na a tuʔijaʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 大坪是中文的說法.
The so-called Tapin is Chinese.

S.FORM: huntu ga mabatuan salun gi a inkahulan nku nabakismiyan ga minaki kiya i mabatuan hasa ru yizhi ris muwah runi i s tapin hani.
S.PHON: ħuntu ɣa maβatuan s~ɕalun ɣi a inkaħulan nku naβakis~ɕmijan ɣa minaki kija i maβatuan ħas~ɕa ru ji*ħi ris~ɕ muwaħ runi i s~ɕ tapin ħani.
S.FORM: huntu ga mabatuan salun gi a inkahulan nku nabakismiyan ga minaki kiya i mabatuan hasa ru yizhi ris muwah runi i s tapin hani.
S.PHON: ħuntu ɣa maβatuan s~ɕalun ɣi a inkaħulan nku naβakis~ɕmijan ɣa minaki kija i maβatuan ħas~ɕa ru ji*ħi ris~ɕ muwaħ runi i s~ɕ tapin ħani.
S.TRANSL: 之所以叫Mabatuan,真的是因為我們祖先曾經住在叫Mabatuan的地方,後來才搬到現在的大坪這裡.
It is called Mabatuan because our forefathers did live and come from the place called Mabatuan and then move to Tapin now.

S.FORM: ru ukas bay ku a naniqunmiyan.
S.PHON: ru ukas~ɕ βaj ku a naniqunmijan.
S.FORM: ru ukas bay ku a naniqunmiyan.
S.PHON: ru ukas~ɕ βaj ku a naniqunmijan.
S.TRANSL: 而且我們真的沒有糧食.
And we really have nothing to eat.

S.FORM: kumaal ku gipun maha u psibaqaysimu su a kinqiyanux nakisimu baq ma nanu' u kaihu nanak su slaq ma.
S.PHON: kumaal ku ɣipun maħa u ps~ɕiβaqajs~ɕimu s~ɕu a kinqijanux nakis~ɕimu βaq ma nanuʔ u kaiħu nanak s~ɕu s~ɕlaq ma.
S.FORM: kumaal ku gipun maha u psibaqaysimu su a kinqiyanux nakisimu baq ma nanu' u kaihu nanak su slaq ma.
S.PHON: kumaal ku ɣipun maħa u ps~ɕiβaqajs~ɕimu s~ɕu a kinqijanux nakis~ɕimu βaq ma nanuʔ u kaiħu nanak s~ɕu s~ɕlaq ma.
S.TRANSL: 日本人說,我們會教你們耕種,這樣你們才知道如何墾自己的田來過生活.
The Japanese say, "we will teach you farming so that you know how to farm your own land."

S.FORM: nanu' tiku slaq ka nangi' na e piang piang tikay hugal hasa ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tiku s~ɕlaq ka naŋiʔ na e piaŋ piaŋ tikaj ħuɣal ħas~ɕa ɣa.
S.FORM: nanu' tiku slaq ka nangi' na e piang piang tikay hugal hasa ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tiku s~ɕlaq ka naŋiʔ na e piaŋ piaŋ tikaj ħuɣal ħas~ɕa ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 下面那一點平平的地.
The pieces of flat land down below.

S.FORM: nanu' usa' kinhiwan bay na qaba' bali kiya ku kakaihu sunga' bay ukas a a kuwaisho la haishi sheme nake chichi ye meyo la.
S.PHON: nanuʔ us~ɕaʔ kinħiwan βaj na qaβaʔ βali kija ku kakaiħu s~ɕuŋaʔ βaj ukas~ɕ a a kuwais~ɕħo la ħais~ɕħi s~ɕħeme nake ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨħi je mejo la.
S.FORM: nanu' usa' kinhiwan bay na qaba' bali kiya ku kakaihu sunga' bay ukas a a kuwaisho la haishi sheme nake chichi ye meyo la.
S.PHON: nanuʔ us~ɕaʔ kinħiwan βaj na qaβaʔ βali kija ku kakaiħu s~ɕuŋaʔ βaj ukas~ɕ a a kuwais~ɕħo la ħais~ɕħi s~ɕħeme nake ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨħi je mejo la.
S.TRANSL: 去挖地時,我們真的用手,因為沒有挖土機,也沒有什麼機器.
When we go digging the land, we use hands because there is no excavator or machine.

S.FORM: a e swoi yani ku niyamu lungulungun sku hani ru atu' na aqih bay ku kinqiyanuxmiyan ka salun maha u mabatuan.
S.PHON: a e s~ɕwoi jani ku nijamu luŋuluŋun s~ɕku ħani ru atuʔ na aqiħ βaj ku kinqijanuxmijan ka s~ɕalun maħa u maβatuan.
S.FORM: a e swoi yani ku niyamu lungulungun sku hani ru atu' na aqih bay ku kinqiyanuxmiyan ka salun maha u mabatuan.
S.PHON: a e s~ɕwoi jani ku nijamu luŋuluŋun s~ɕku ħani ru atuʔ na aqiħ βaj ku kinqijanuxmijan ka s~ɕalun maħa u maβatuan.
S.TRANSL: 我真的覺得我們這個叫做大坪的地方,生活真的很不好.
I truly think our lives in the place called Mabatuan is not really good.

S.FORM: tisami ka yencumin hani ga kumaal ku hanren maha u balisimu minukahul ragiyax ma minukahulsimu i nari a ha firipin napen tiau kuolai la maha.
S.PHON: tis~ɕami ka jenʦ~ʨumin ħani ɣa kumaal ku ħanren maħa u βalis~ɕimu minukaħul raɣijax ma minukaħuls~ɕimu i nari a ħa *iripin napen tiau kuolai la maħa.
S.FORM: tisami ka yencumin hani ga kumaal ku hanren maha u balisimu minukahul ragiyax ma minukahulsimu i nari a ha firipin napen tiau kuolai la maha.
S.PHON: tis~ɕami ka jenʦ~ʨumin ħani ɣa kumaal ku ħanren maħa u βalis~ɕimu minukaħul raɣijax ma minukaħuls~ɕimu i nari a ħa *iripin napen tiau kuolai la maħa.
S.TRANSL: 漢人說我們原住民不是從山上來的,是從菲律賓那邊來的.
The Chinese say, "You aboriginal people, you are not from the mountains, you are from the Philippine area.

S.FORM: shish i ye ciangde putsuo haish zenmeyang wome ye wowo ye pusiaude la.
S.PHON: s~ɕħis~ɕħ i je ʦ~ʨiaŋ*e puts~ɕuo ħais~ɕħ *enmejaŋ wome je wowo je pus~ɕiau*e la.
S.FORM: shish i ye ciangde putsuo haish zenmeyang wome ye wowo ye pusiaude la.
S.PHON: s~ɕħis~ɕħ i je ʦ~ʨiaŋ*e puts~ɕuo ħais~ɕħ *enmejaŋ wome je wowo je pus~ɕiau*e la.
S.TRANSL: 事實上這樣講也沒錯,反正怎樣我是不曉得啦.
Actually, such saying may be right; anyway, I am not quite sure.

S.FORM: yinwe kuwing ka nabakis la ga ini'mu baqi i panaspung ku inlulungan nku malahangita'.
S.PHON: jinwe kuwiŋ ka naβakis~ɕ la ɣa iniʔmu βaqi i panas~ɕpuŋ ku inluluŋan nku malaħaŋitaʔ.
S.FORM: yinwe kuwing ka nabakis la ga ini'mu baqi i panaspung ku inlulungan nku malahangita'.
S.PHON: jinwe kuwiŋ ka naβakis~ɕ la ɣa iniʔmu βaqi i panas~ɕpuŋ ku inluluŋan nku malaħaŋitaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 像我這個老人家也無法評斷照顧我們的人(政府)的想法.

S.TRANSL: 像我這個老人家也無法評斷照顧我們的人 的想法.

TRANSL.notes: Old people like me cannot comment on the thoughts of those who take care of us (the government).

S.TRANSL: Old people like me cannot comment on the thoughts of those who take care of us .

S.FORM: nanu' yani ku niya kung maha u sami ka itaal ka niya' i mabatuan na hani aqih bay kinqiyanuxmiyan.
S.PHON: nanuʔ jani ku nija kuŋ maħa u s~ɕami ka itaal ka nijaʔ i maβatuan na ħani aqiħ βaj kinqijanuxmijan.
S.FORM: nanu' yani ku niya kung maha u sami ka itaal ka niya' i mabatuan na hani aqih bay kinqiyanuxmiyan.
S.PHON: nanuʔ jani ku nija kuŋ maħa u s~ɕami ka itaal ka nijaʔ i maβatuan na ħani aqiħ βaj kinqijanuxmijan.
S.TRANSL: 所以我說,我們在Mabatuan的生活真的不好.
So I say our lives in Mabatuan are relly not good.

S.FORM: e ulung yaku tawki' ka niya i e pasibaq su kai'sami maha u.
S.PHON: e uluŋ jaku tawkiʔ ka nija i e pas~ɕiβaq s~ɕu kaiʔs~ɕami maħa u.
S.FORM: e ulung yaku tawki' ka niya i e pasibaq su kai'sami maha u.
S.PHON: e uluŋ jaku tawkiʔ ka nija i e pas~ɕiβaq s~ɕu kaiʔs~ɕami maħa u.
S.TRANSL: 幸好有政府在指導我們生活方法.
Luckily, the government is teaching us how to live.

S.FORM: a kalawkah matauwaw ru pumuwa' su anananu' shueikuo la haiyo nake yumi sheme nochanpin ga i a nimenyauco gi nimen meyo co ga nimen huei osh maha ku malahangita' ru.
S.PHON: a kalawkaħ matauwaw ru pumuwaʔ s~ɕu anananuʔ s~ɕħueikuo la ħaijo nake jumi s~ɕħeme noʦ~ʨħanpin ɣa i a nimenjauʦ~ʨo ɣi nimen mejo ʦ~ʨo ɣa nimen ħuei os~ɕħ maħa ku malaħaŋitaʔ ru.
S.FORM: a kalawkah matauwaw ru pumuwa' su anananu' shueikuo la haiyo nake yumi sheme nochanpin ga i a nimenyauco gi nimen meyo co ga nimen huei osh maha ku malahangita' ru.
S.PHON: a kalawkaħ matauwaw ru pumuwaʔ s~ɕu anananuʔ s~ɕħueikuo la ħaijo nake jumi s~ɕħeme noʦ~ʨħanpin ɣa i a nimenjauʦ~ʨo ɣi nimen mejo ʦ~ʨo ɣa nimen ħuei os~ɕħ maħa ku malaħaŋitaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 政府說你們要努力工作,種各種作物,像水果、玉米等農產品,你們要工作,因為如果不工作就會餓死.
The government says that you have to work hard and grow all kinds of produce like fruits and corn. You have to work or you will starve to die.

S.FORM: e yani nanak ku baqunmu suoi tiku sami ka mabatuan hani ga matu'uwal ku kai'miyan gi anasisali la ga minkahulmiyan sku e papak sialaide nake hua e.
S.PHON: e jani nanak ku βaqunmu s~ɕuoi tiku s~ɕami ka maβatuan ħani ɣa matuʔuwal ku kaiʔmijan ɣi anas~ɕis~ɕali la ɣa minkaħulmijan s~ɕku e papak s~ɕialai*e nake ħua e.
S.FORM: e yani nanak ku baqunmu suoi tiku sami ka mabatuan hani ga matu'uwal ku kai'miyan gi anasisali la ga minkahulmiyan sku e papak sialaide nake hua e.
S.PHON: e jani nanak ku βaqunmu s~ɕuoi tiku s~ɕami ka maβatuan ħani ɣa matuʔuwal ku kaiʔmijan ɣi anas~ɕis~ɕali la ɣa minkaħulmijan s~ɕku e papak s~ɕialai*e nake ħua e.

TRANSL.notes: 我們的話(語言)叫 Matu'uwal 因為這是依據我們從papak那邊下來講的話.

S.TRANSL: 我們的話 叫 Matu'uwal 因為這是依據我們從papak那邊下來講的話.
That is all I know, and our language is called Matu'uwal because that's how we call it in Papak.

S.FORM: e bali i itaalsami ukas bay ku baqunmiyan gi ki'i sunga' hiya' ga ma'imagsami na ss sami sku qasinu ruwa.
S.PHON: e βali i itaals~ɕami ukas~ɕ βaj ku βaqunmijan ɣi kiʔi s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ ɣa maʔimaɣs~ɕami na s~ɕs~ɕ s~ɕami s~ɕku qas~ɕinu ruwa.
S.FORM: e bali i itaalsami ukas bay ku baqunmiyan gi ki'i sunga' hiya' ga ma'imagsami na ss sami sku qasinu ruwa.
S.PHON: e βali i itaals~ɕami ukas~ɕ βaj ku βaqunmijan ɣi kiʔi s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ ɣa maʔimaɣs~ɕami na s~ɕs~ɕ s~ɕami s~ɕku qas~ɕinu ruwa.
S.TRANSL: 我們有很多事情不懂,可能是因為我們泰雅人以前和野獸住一起.

TRANSL.notes: We don't know much probably because we Atayal (used to) live with wild animals.

S.TRANSL: We don't know much probably because we Atayal live with wild animals.

S.FORM: kiya ruma' ga magayungay ru magabauwak ru.
S.PHON: kija rumaʔ ɣa maɣajuŋaj ru maɣaβauwak ru.
S.FORM: kiya ruma' ga magayungay ru magabauwak ru.
S.PHON: kija rumaʔ ɣa maɣajuŋaj ru maɣaβauwak ru.
S.TRANSL: 有些變成猴子,有些變成山豬.
Some turn into monkeys and some become boars.

S.FORM: ini' i ki'i mi minukahul kiya ku k ku kai' ka ma manananak ru.
S.PHON: iniʔ i kiʔi mi minukaħul kija ku k ku kaiʔ ka ma manananak ru.
S.FORM: ini' i ki'i mi minukahul kiya ku k ku kai' ka ma manananak ru.
S.PHON: iniʔ i kiʔi mi minukaħul kija ku k ku kaiʔ ka ma manananak ru.
S.TRANSL: 可能我們的語言是從那裡發源的,所以很奇怪.
Probably our language originated from there, so it is strange.

S.FORM: ini' isami pakababaq la ru siancai la ga u kiya ku e kai' nku muyu ka maha pasibaqaysami su kai' la ru nakisimu i e baq su kai' nakisimu i b baq nakimiyan baqun i mung ku kai'mamu maha ka ku.
S.PHON: iniʔ is~ɕami pakaβaβaq la ru s~ɕianʦ~ʨai la ɣa u kija ku e kaiʔ nku muju ka maħa pas~ɕiβaqajs~ɕami s~ɕu kaiʔ la ru nakis~ɕimu i e βaq s~ɕu kaiʔ nakis~ɕimu i β βaq nakimijan βaqun i muŋ ku kaiʔmamu maħa ka ku.
S.FORM: ini' isami pakababaq la ru siancai la ga u kiya ku e kai' nku muyu ka maha pasibaqaysami su kai' la ru nakisimu i e baq su kai' nakisimu i b baq nakimiyan baqun i mung ku kai'mamu maha ka ku.
S.PHON: iniʔ is~ɕami pakaβaβaq la ru s~ɕianʦ~ʨai la ɣa u kija ku e kaiʔ nku muju ka maħa pas~ɕiβaqajs~ɕami s~ɕu kaiʔ la ru nakis~ɕimu i e βaq s~ɕu kaiʔ nakis~ɕimu i β βaq nakimijan βaqun i muŋ ku kaiʔmamu maħa ka ku.
S.TRANSL: 我們以前互相不瞭解,但現在你們教我們你們的母語,我們才會知道、才能聽懂你們的話.

TRANSL.notes: We didn't know each other before, but now you teach us your mother tongue (Chinese) so we know and understand each other now.

S.TRANSL: We didn't know each other before, but now you teach us your mother tongue so we know and understand each other now.

S.FORM: malahang itaal ru nanu' yani a mana'aringmiyan ni a mkibaq su kai' na tu'iya' ru kai' na sayhu' kai' na hulu'.
S.PHON: malaħaŋ itaal ru nanuʔ jani a manaʔariŋmijan ni a mkiβaq s~ɕu kaiʔ na tuʔijaʔ ru kaiʔ na s~ɕajħuʔ kaiʔ na ħuluʔ.
S.FORM: malahang itaal ru nanu' yani a mana'aringmiyan ni a mkibaq su kai' na tu'iya' ru kai' na sayhu' kai' na hulu'.
S.PHON: malaħaŋ itaal ru nanuʔ jani a manaʔariŋmijan ni a mkiβaq s~ɕu kaiʔ na tuʔijaʔ ru kaiʔ na s~ɕajħuʔ kaiʔ na ħuluʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (政府)照顧泰雅人,所以我們開始學中文、客家話和河洛話(閩南語).

S.TRANSL: 照顧泰雅人,所以我們開始學中文、客家話和河洛話 .

TRANSL.notes: (The government) takes care of Atayal people, and we start learning languages of Chinese, Hakka, and Southern Min.

S.TRANSL: takes care of Atayal people, and we start learning languages of Chinese, Hakka, and Southern Min.

S.FORM: nanu' yani ku maha kung maha u atu' na aqih bay ku inkahulanmiyan ka.
S.PHON: nanuʔ jani ku maħa kuŋ maħa u atuʔ na aqiħ βaj ku inkaħulanmijan ka.
S.FORM: nanu' yani ku maha kung maha u atu' na aqih bay ku inkahulanmiyan ka.
S.PHON: nanuʔ jani ku maħa kuŋ maħa u atuʔ na aqiħ βaj ku inkaħulanmijan ka.
S.TRANSL: 我一直在想,我們的發源真的很不好.
I've been thinking that our lives in the beginning are really not good.

S.FORM: minukahul sami lahulahu ka sami ka itaal.
S.PHON: minukaħul s~ɕami laħulaħu ka s~ɕami ka itaal.
S.FORM: minukahul sami lahulahu ka sami ka itaal.
S.PHON: minukaħul s~ɕami laħulaħu ka s~ɕami ka itaal.
S.TRANSL: 我們泰雅人從森林來.
We Atayal come from the forest.
